title.en: OpenThermal AI Copilot: homepage entry + Engineering Workspace + Project Space
title.zh: OpenThermal AI Copilot：首页入口 + 工程工作台 + 项目空间

summary.en: Phase 1 mock Copilot on the homepage, AI Engineering Workspace with agent/tool routing, and local Project Space. Not a live LLM yet.
summary.zh: 首页 Phase 1 mock Copilot、带 Agent/工具路由的 AI 工程工作台，以及本地项目空间。尚未接入真实大模型。

title.en: Platform skeleton: Why · AI Workspace · Engineering Suite · What's Next
title.zh: 平台骨架：Why · AI Workspace · 工程套件 · What's Next

summary.en: New Why Open Thermal AI and AI Workspace (Coming Soon) pages. Tools rebranded as Engineering Suite. Homepage hero and What's Next clarify platform direction.
summary.zh: 新增 Why Open Thermal AI 与 AI Workspace（即将推出）。工具统一为 Engineering Suite。首页 Hero 与 What's Next 明确平台方向。

title.en: Platform IA upgrade: Open Knowledge · Roadmap · Open Core services
title.zh: 平台信息架构升级：开放知识 · 路线图 · Open Core 服务

summary.en: Homepage repositioned as Open Thermal AI platform (founder as trust strip). New public Roadmap. Services framed as Open Core + Professional Services. Knowledge hub branded Open Knowledge with Open Dataset placeholders.
summary.zh: 首页定位为 Open Thermal AI 平台（创始人作信任条）。新增公开路线图。服务改为 Open Core + 专业服务。知识库强化为 Open Knowledge，并加入 Open Dataset 占位。

title.en: Open Thermal AI v4.0 — platform major release
title.zh: Open Thermal AI v4.0 — 平台大版本发布

summary.en: Major version bump to 4.0.0 for the Open Thermal AI shell (dark theme, IA, AI preview). Site legal notice updated for platform tools and Phase 1 AI prototype wording.
summary.zh: 版本升级至 4.0.0，对应 Open Thermal AI 平台壳层（暗色主题、信息架构、AI 预览）。免责声明同步适配平台工具与 Phase 1 AI 原型表述。

title.en: IA alignment: Insights under Knowledge · Tools taxonomy · AI Preview
title.zh: 信息架构对齐：洞察并入知识库 · 工具分类 · AI 预览定位

summary.en: Top nav drops Insights (now under Knowledge). Tools Center taxonomy updated. AI Thermal Engineer labeled Prototype / Phase 1. Cases carry structured engineering data for future RAG.
summary.zh: 顶栏去掉 Insights（并入 Knowledge）。工具中心分类更新。AI Thermal Engineer 标明原型/Phase 1。案例增加结构化工程字段，服务未来 RAG。

title.en: Open Thermal AI platform shell (Phase 1)
title.zh: Open Thermal AI 平台壳层上线（Phase 1）

summary.en: Rebranded navigation, AI Thermal Engineer mock, Tools hub, Cases library, and Founder page—Vite-based Phase 1 toward a global industrial heat-pump intelligence platform.
summary.zh: 品牌与导航升级、AI 热泵工程师（mock）、工具中心、案例库与创始人页——基于现有 Vite 架构的 Phase 1 平台壳层。

title.en: Engineering services: Annex 58 Tasks 1–5 frame
title.zh: 工程服务：按 Annex 58 Task 1–5 重组上线

summary.en: New Services hub aligned with IEA HPT Annex 58—technologies, integration, transition, specs & testing, dissemination—with illustrated guides and official links.
summary.zh: 新增工程服务入口，结构对齐 IEA HPT Annex 58：技术、集成、转型、规格与测试、传播；含示意图与官网链接。

title.en: Shared directory tree across Content, Knowledge, and Tools
title.zh: 内容中心、知识库、工具与标准共用目录树

summary.en: Each hub shows a scannable outline of its sections; child pages share the same collapsible directory for quick jumps.
summary.zh: 三大板块入口页展示可扫读大纲目录；各子页共用可折叠目录栏，便于同板块内跳转检索。

title.en: Part 1 extreme-cold charts: language-switched images
title.zh: 第 1 讲极寒图表：中英切换换图

summary.en: Chinese mode keeps the original Chinese charts; English mode loads English-label versions derived from those artworks.
summary.zh: 中文模式保持极寒两张中文原图；英文模式切换为基于中文原图改成的英文标注版。

title.en: 3D knowledge cutaways: Chinese assets on language switch
title.zh: 知识库 3D 剖视图：中英切换换图

summary.en: Manifest 3D figures keep English originals for EN; ZH loads dedicated Chinese-label PNGs (translations based on English labels).
summary.zh: 3D 清单图英文界面用原图；中文界面切换为中文标注版（译文以图内英文为准）。

title.en: Fixed missing glyphs (□) in knowledge diagrams
title.zh: 修复知识库示意图缺字方框（□）

summary.en: Latin labels now use Unicode-capable fonts; subscripts/Δ in schematics rewritten as ASCII (dT1, CO2, dP) so boxes no longer appear after T.
summary.zh: 英文标注改用含全量符号的字体；示意图中的下标与 Δ 改为 ASCII（dT1、CO2、dP），消除 T 后出现方框的问题。

title.en: Heat exchanger guide: fixed counterflow temperature profiles
title.zh: 换热器导读：修正逆流温谱配图

summary.en: Chapter 3 LMTD schematic no longer shows an impossible hot/cold temperature cross; hot stays above cold with a clear approach at the hot-in / cold-out end.
summary.zh: 第 3 章 LMTD 示意不再出现不可能的冷热流体温度交叉；全程热侧高于冷侧，并在热侧进/冷侧出端标出接近温度。

title.en: Restored 3D knowledge cutaways + bilingual legend strips
title.zh: 恢复知识库 3D 剖视原图，并加双语图例条

summary.en: Physical/3D figures overwritten by schematic redraws are restored; each keeps a bottom EN/ZH title strip without covering the artwork.
summary.zh: 此前被框线示意覆盖的实物/3D 剖视图已恢复；底部增加英主中辅标题条，不遮挡主体。

title.en: All knowledge diagrams + HTHP configs: bilingual labels
title.zh: 知识库示意图与 HTHP 构型图全面中英对照

summary.en: Every knowledge-hub figure now uses English-first labels with Chinese underneath; homepage HTHP config schematics get bilingual Heat sink/source overlays—same assets for both languages.
summary.zh: 知识库各专章示意均为英文为主、中文对照；首页高温热泵构型图叠标热汇/热源等双语；中英切换不换图。

title.en: Pilot: bilingual diagram labels (EN primary / ZH)
title.zh: 试点：知识库示意图中英对照（英主中辅）

summary.en: Cycle-guide figures and the extreme-cold demand/lifecycle charts now carry English-first labels with Chinese underneath—same image for both site languages.
summary.zh: 循环导读全部示意与基础知识中极寒负荷/生命周期成本图改为英文为主、中文对照；中英切换不换图。

title.en: Knowledge hub: refrigeration & heat-pump cycle guide
title.zh: 知识库新增制冷/热泵循环导读

summary.en: Illustrated map of reverse Carnot, Brayton, vapor-compression upgrades, transcritical CO₂, absorption, and open steam/MVR—inserted between fundamentals and refrigerants.
summary.zh: 图文介绍逆卡诺、布雷顿、蒸汽压缩强化、跨临界 CO₂、吸收式与开式蒸汽/MVR；学习路径插在基础与制冷剂之间。

title.en: Knowledge hub: lubricants, piping, enclosure, shop & test
title.zh: 知识库新增润滑油、管路、机柜与产线测试专章

summary.en: Four new illustrated guides covering oil chemistry, piping supports and insulation, frames/cables, and factory tools plus test benches—inserted after electrical in the learning path.
summary.zh: 四篇图文专章：油品化学、管路支架与防腐保温、机架电缆、产线工具与测试台；学习路径接在电气之后。

title.en: Site-wide keyword search in the navbar
title.zh: 导航栏新增站内关键词搜索

summary.en: Use the magnifier (or ⌘K / Ctrl+K) to search pages, briefings, insights, and toolbox apps by keyword.
summary.zh: 点击导航栏放大镜（或 ⌘K / Ctrl+K），可按关键词检索页面、行业简报、工程洞察与工具。

title.en: Vessels & electrical guides: cutaway figures upgraded
title.zh: 容器与电气导读：配图升级为剖视风格

summary.en: Vessel and electrical chapter figures now use 3D cutaways aligned with the compressor, heat-exchanger, and valve guides. Controller and panel chapters gain dedicated diagrams.
summary.zh: 容器与电气各章配图改为与压缩机、换热器、阀件一致的 3D 剖视；控制器与盘柜章节补齐专图。

title.en: Knowledge hub: vessels & electrical guides, reordered path
title.zh: 知识库新增容器与电气专章，并重排学习路径

summary.en: New illustrated pages on oil separators, accumulators, receivers, flash tanks, plus motors, VFDs, controllers, AI/IoT. Hub order: fundamentals → refrigerants → compressors → heat exchangers → vessels → valves → electrical → industrial HTHP.
summary.zh: 新增油分/气分/贮液器/闪发罐，以及电机、变频、控制器、AI/物联图文导读。枢纽顺序：基础 → 制冷剂 → 压缩机 → 换热器 → 容器 → 阀件 → 电气 → 工业高温热泵。

title.en: Heat exchanger & valve guides: cutaway figures and clearer Chinese
title.zh: 换热器与阀件导读：剖视图升级与中文措辞优化

summary.en: Family/TXV–EEV/reversing panels now show internal cutaways (aligned with the compressor guide). Chinese copy rewritten for clearer engineering wording.
summary.zh: 结构家族、TXV/EEV 与四通换向等配图改为内部剖视（对齐压缩机导读风格）；中文全文润色，减少直译与费解表述。

title.en: Valve knowledge guide added to Knowledge
title.zh: 知识库新增阀件图文导读

summary.en: New illustrated page: cycle roles, TXV/EEV, reversing and system valves, water-side boundary, common faults, and a selection checklist—with links to heat exchangers, compressors, and refrigerants.
summary.zh: 新增图文专页：循环角色、TXV/EEV、换向与系统阀、水路边界、常见故障与选型清单；并链至换热器、压缩机与制冷剂百科。

title.en: Heat exchanger knowledge guide added to Knowledge
title.zh: 知识库新增换热器图文导读

summary.en: New illustrated page: cycle roles, families, LMTD and approach, duty reading, frost/fouling/oil, high-temperature heat-pump duty, and a selection checklist.
summary.zh: 新增图文专页：循环角色、结构家族、接近温度与流路、工况读法、结霜结垢与回油、高温热泵要点与选型清单。

title.en: Compressor knowledge guide added to Knowledge
title.zh: 知识库新增压缩机图文导读

summary.en: New illustrated page: cycle role, machine families, hermetic construction, performance maps, oil return, high-lift heat-pump duty, and a selection checklist—with links to the 匹 chapter, refrigerants, HTHP, and OEM tools.
summary.zh: 新增图文专页：循环角色、机型家族、全封/半封结构、性能图读法、回油与可靠性、大温升热泵要点与选型清单；并链至「匹」专章、制冷剂百科、工业高温热泵与 OEM 工具。

title.en: Site navigation simplified — Content, Knowledge, Tools & Standards
title.zh: 内容板块归并：内容中心 / 知识库 / 工具与标准

summary.en: Nav reduced to three hubs: Content (briefings, insights, industry notes), Knowledge (fundamentals, refrigerants guide + property table, industrial HTHP), and Tools & Standards (standards, policies, links). Old URLs redirect.
summary.zh: 导航收敛为三大入口：内容中心（简报、洞察、行业观察）、知识库（基础、制冷剂百科含工质表、工业高温热泵）、工具与标准（标准、政策、外链合一）。旧 URL 已设重定向。

title.en: HPT Annex 68 progress snapshot (July 2026)
title.zh: Annex 68 与 IEA HPT 最新进展简报

summary.en: Restored Project 68 note page: Vienna HPC workshop (80+ participants), Task 1 database at 55+ suppliers and 40+ demo cases, sector integration templates, and Skills4HP updates.
summary.zh: 修复 Project 68 独立页并更新至 7 月版：维也纳热泵大会工作坊（80+ 参与者）、Task 1 数据库 55+ 供方与 40+ 示范案例、行业集成模版与 Skills4HP 进展。

title.en: Industrial heat pump standards lookup updated
title.zh: 工业热泵标准速查页更新

summary.en: Dataset refreshed against public sources; SAC/TC238 heat pump standard system excerpts added.
summary.zh: 按公开信息核对更新数据集，并增补全国冷冻空调标委会（SAC/TC238）热泵标准化体系摘录条目。

title.en: Industrial heat pump policies page expanded
title.zh: 工业热泵政策页深度解读更新

summary.en: Added NDRC 698 nine-sector retrofit plan analysis and green-power consumption rules (Order 42) synergy notes.
summary.zh: 增补发改环资〔2026〕698 号九大行业改造清单解读，以及绿电消费与设备更新协同合规路径。

title.en: What's New — stay current at a glance
title.zh: 最近更新提醒上线

summary.en: A bell icon in the nav shows recent briefings, insights, and page updates when you return.
summary.zh: 导航栏铃铛入口可查看最新周报、洞察与页面更新，回访即可掌握动态。
